productDisplayName: Peter England Men Statements Black Wallet
description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this wallet from peter england is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Peter England perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet.Dimensions: 11.5 cm X 9.2 cmA contrast coloured horizontal line running across the walletHas two main compartmentsThree credit card slots on either sides of the walletTwo slip pockets for coins on either sideA vertical zippered pocket on the stem of the walletCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
